creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce this issue: libgdiplus-3.8_3 build correctly on both 
10_1_RELEASE_i386 and 10_1_RELEASE_amd64 jails in poudriere with recent snpashot of the ports tree (a few days ago).

Can you please update & clean your poudriere ports tree, try again and report success or failure, specifying the ports tree version in case of failure ?

Thanks!
